div.p: Workflow Lifecycle: Client Request → Local Log Append → Parallel Peer RPCs → Quorum Calculation → Global Commit → State Machine Apply

ul.li: Leader Completeness: Committed entries must persist across leader elections.
State Machine Safety: One entry per index across all machines.
Sequential Application: lastApplied strictly monotonic; entries applied in index order.
Safety Threshold: Majority Quorum (N/2 + 1) required for progress.
